publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-06-21 18:11:14 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: The collection contains departmental annual reports, budget reports, committee reports and core program summaries.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: L. Reul, October 2005Daniel W. Young, August 2010Daniel W. Young, November 2011

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Dr. Henry is the Ronald P. Lynch Dean Emerita of Agriculture and Life Sciences.

emph.ref: Series III. Outreach, Programs, and Initiatives

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Susan A. Henry papers, #21-1-3456. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: The collection contains subject files, departmental annual reports, budget reports, committee reports, core program summaries, and college related videotapes. Also, speeches, 2000-2010.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, an ear of corn (cross made in 1968) demonstrating transposible genetic elements given to Dr. Henry by Barbara McClintock ca. 1983 after her day's visit to Cold Spring Harbor, with the handwritten text of Dr. Henry's lecture for an advanced graduate genetics course at the Albert Einstein College of Medicine; and an article on McClintock by Lucy Shapiro and Susan Henry in Einstein, the newsletter of the Albert Einstein College of Medicine, Fall, 1983.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access to the Dean's Office records restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

controlaccess.subject: Genetics.
Corn -- Genetics.
controlaccess.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences -- : Administration.

scopecontent.p: Videocassette, DVD, and brochures. In English and Spanish.
